nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2016; const int b = 2102; const int c = 2127; const int d = 2145; const int e = 2160; const int f = 2174; const int g = 2187; const int h = 2200; const int i = 2213; const int j = 2227; const int k = 2242; const int l = 2260; const int m = 2285; const int n = 2371;
